name: Phillips 66
summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is an energy manufacturing and logistics company operating across four segments: Midstream, Chemicals, Refining, and Marketing & Specialties. The company refines crude oil into fuels, processes and transports natural gas liquids, produces petrochemicals through equity affiliates, and markets refined petroleum products. It operates refineries, pipelines, terminals, and gathering assets across the U.S. and internationally, including renewable fuels facilities.

products.name: Refined Petroleum Products
products.description: Gasoline, diesel, and other fuels produced at domestic and international refineries.

products.name: Natural Gas Liquids Midstream Services
products.description: Gathering, processing, fractionation, and transportation of NGLs via pipelines and terminals.

products.name: Renewable Fuels
products.description: Production and marketing of renewable fuels at dedicated facilities.

products.name: Petrochemicals
products.description: Petrochemical products produced through equity method chemical segment investments.

partnerships.description: Joint venture refining partnership, with activity noted through Q3 2025.
Variable interest entity pipeline investment held through Phillips 66 Partners LP.
Equity investment in natural gas pipeline, with transaction activity in January 2025.
Equity method pipeline investment with disposition activity in June 2024.
International marketing investment with transaction activity in January and December 2025.
